# mongodb\-mcp

```go
import "github.com/stubbedev/mongodb-mcp/cmd/mongodb-mcp"
```

Command mongodb\-mcp is an MCP server exposing MongoDB over stdio or streamable HTTP. It is designed to run on the same machine as its consumer and to sit cleanly behind an MCP/reverse proxy.
